body: ## [3.2.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v3.2.0...v3.2.1) (2017-02-22) ### Bug Fixes * **umd:** Add connectors to UMD build (algolia/react-instantsearch#1988) ([3e5db05](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/3e5db05)), closes [#1987](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1987)
